title: From Synthesis to Clinical Assistance: A Strategy-Aware Agent Framework for Autism Intervention based on Real Clinical Dataset
note: Strategy-aware autism intervention framework with specialized doctor and child agents for clinically grounded dialogue synthesis.

title: A Proactive Multi-Agent Dialogue Framework for Assessing Social Language Disorder Traits in Autism
note: Doctor and patient agents improve diagnostic coverage and efficiency for autism-related social language assessment.

title: SocialWise: LLM-Agentic Conversation Therapy for Individuals with Autism Spectrum Disorder to Enhance Communication Skills
note: Browser-based conversation therapy system with LLM role-play, retrieval, and structured communication feedback.

title: InterventionLens: A Multi-Agent Framework for Detecting ASD Intervention Strategies in Parent-Child Shared Reading
note: Multi-agent video analysis framework for recognizing caregiver intervention strategies in home-based ASD reading sessions.

title: NeuroWise: A Multi-Agent LLM Glass-Box System for Practicing Double-Empathy Communication with Autistic Partners
note: Glass-box multi-agent communication training system grounded in the double-empathy framework.

title: Human-mediated Large Language Models for Robotic Intervention in Children with Autism Spectrum Disorders
note: LLM-powered robot intervention pipeline for perspective-taking training in children with autism.

title: A Virtual Conversational Agent for Teens with Autism: Experimental Results and Design Lessons
note: Early but still useful virtual-agent benchmark for private social-skills practice and feedback.

title: Exploring Implicit Perspectives on Autism in Large Language Models Through Multi-Agent Simulations
note: Multi-agent simulations expose how LLMs implicitly frame autistic and non-autistic social interaction.

title: When Machines Get It Wrong: Large Language Models Perpetuate Autism Myths More Than Humans Do
note: Directly measures autism-myth endorsement and finds major knowledge fidelity gaps in frontier LLMs.

title: Affordances and Risks of ChatGPT to Autistic Users
note: Examines the practical benefits and risks autistic users report when using ChatGPT in daily life.

title: "Are we writing an advice column for Spock here?" Understanding Stereotypes in AI Advice for Autistic Users
note: Large-scale audit of how disclosure of autism changes LLM advice and can trigger stereotyped recommendations.

title: Large Language Models as Simulative Agents for Neurodivergent Adult Psychometric Profiles
note: Tests whether LLMs can simulate neurodivergent psychometric responses with useful fidelity.

title: NeuroBridge: Using Generative AI to Bridge Cross-neurotype Communication Differences through Neurotypical Perspective-taking
note: Generative AI platform for helping neurotypical users experience and reflect on autistic communication styles.

title: NeuroMambaLLM: Dynamic Graph Learning of fMRI Functional Connectivity in Autistic Brains Using Mamba and Language Model Reasoning
note: Combines dynamic brain connectivity modeling with language-model reasoning for autism-related neuroimaging analysis.

title: Multimodal Data Integration for Early Autism Detection and LLM-Assisted Intervention Planning
note: Combines multimodal early detection with LLM-assisted planning for downstream intervention decisions.

title: Safety-Constrained Agentic AI for Autism Screening: A Multimodal, Clinician-Guided Architecture
note: Clinician-guided agentic architecture aimed at safer multimodal autism screening workflows.

title: ScreeningPaL: LLM-NLP Enabled Early Autism Detection Method from Caregiver's Free-Text Input
note: Uses free-text caregiver descriptions with LLM-NLP methods to support early autism detection.

title: GPT-Powered Chatbot-Based Positive Psychology Intervention for Parents of Autistic Children
note: Chatbot intervention study focused on supporting parents of autistic children.

title: Accuracy of Autism-Related TikTok Information in Italian: A Comparison Between Human Raters and Large Language Models
note: Benchmarks whether human reviewers and LLMs can reliably judge autism-related health information quality.

title: A PATE-to-MedPrompt System for Autism Detection
note: Medical prompting pipeline for autism detection from symptom-centered narratives.

title: Autism Detection Based on Computational Analysis of Parental Speech
note: Computational speech analysis approach for autism screening using parental-language signals.

title: Parents' perspectives on the use of artificial intelligence chatbots to promote physical activity among individuals with autism spectrum disorder
note: Useful applied paper on caregiver acceptance of AI chatbots for autism-support routines.

title: Functional near-infrared spectroscopy-based machine learning techniques for autism spectrum disorder diagnosis: a systematic review and meta-analysis
note: Meta-analysis of machine-learning diagnosis pipelines using fNIRS for ASD detection.

title: Multimodal behavioral analysis of child play interactions for early detection of Autism Spectrum Disorder
note: Recent multimodal behavioral study for early ASD detection in naturalistic play settings.

title: Machine Learning Algorithms for Detection of Autism Spectrum Disorders in Early Childhood: A Scoping Review
note: Broad review of machine-learning approaches for early-childhood autism detection.
